name: bandit-config-migration
description: Move bandit skip flags from pre-commit hook CLI args to a .bandit INI config file so suppressions are visible to developers running bandit directly. Use when: (1) bandit --skip flags are embedded in pre-commit hook entry and invisible to manual runs, (2) developers get false positives running bandit locally that CI suppresses, (3) you need documented skip rationale discoverable without reading .pre-commit-config.yaml.
